python--python-data-functions--draft.title: Python Data and Functions
python--python-data-functions--draft.description: Move from small scripts to programs that organize real information. You will choose between lists, tuples, and dictionaries, design reusable functions, split work across helper modules, read and write files, recover from bad input, and finish with a multi-step data-cleaning capstone in a new community-event domain.

python-5-lists-tuples-and-dictionaries.title: Lists, Tuples, and Dictionaries
python-5-lists-tuples-and-dictionaries.description: Organize related values with lists, protect fixed records with tuples, and retrieve named information with dictionaries.
outcomes: Use tuples for fixed grouped values
why: Collection choice communicates whether data is ordered, fixed, or addressed by a meaningful key.
These structures become the shared vocabulary for functions, files, and every project that follows.

python-6-functions-and-modularity.title: Functions and Modularity
python-6-functions-and-modularity.description: Turn repeated logic into focused functions, define clear inputs and return values, and move reusable work into helper files.
outcomes: Separate program logic into small pieces
Use simple imports and helper modules
why: Functions make a program easier to test because each piece has one named responsibility.
Modules let a growing project reuse that logic without copying it into main.py.

python-7-files-exceptions-and-data-clean.title: Files, Exceptions, and Data Cleaning
python-7-files-exceptions-and-data-clean.description: Read information that survives beyond one run, clean imperfect values, handle expected failures, and write dependable output files.
why: Real programs rarely receive perfectly formatted data or guaranteed file paths.
File and exception skills let a script become a resilient tool instead of a one-time demonstration.

python-8-real-world-project.title: Real-World Project
python-8-real-world-project.description: Transfer the course skills to a community-event registration cleaner with helper modules, validation, summaries, and written deliverables.
outcomes: Read and clean a structured file line by line
Refactor cleaning and summary logic into helper functions
Write final output files and summaries from one complete workflow
why: A new domain proves that the techniques work beyond the examples used to teach them.
The capstone connects collections, functions, modules, files, exceptions, and reporting in one coherent workflow.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: List Basics
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Create ordered collections, change them deliberately, loop through every item, and contrast mutable lists with fixed tuple records.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Dictionaries
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Address information by meaningful keys, update entries safely, and combine dictionaries with nested lists and records.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Module Project
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Build a workshop schedule from tuples, a list of sessions, and a dictionary lookup instead of returning to another gradebook.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Function Basics
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Name a reusable operation, pass it the values it needs, and distinguish displaying a result from returning it to another part of the program.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Function Design
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Limit scope, split large tasks into helpers, document the contract, and move reusable logic into an importable module.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Module Project
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Package a name-badge formatter across helper and entry files so each file owns one clear responsibility.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: File Input and Output
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Read and write text through explicit paths, then treat folders and filenames as part of the program contract.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Exceptions and Cleaning
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Recover from expected failures, normalize messy text, convert values safely, and process CSV rows one dependable step at a time.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Module Project
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Clean a student-data file into a new output artifact while preserving valid rows and skipping malformed scores.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Final Project
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Deliver a community-event registration cleaner in a new domain, with modular cleaning, summaries, output files, and deterministic tests.
